overview.title: Overview
overview.desc: Account and session status at a glance
overview.emptyDesc: Add Trae accounts you own to switch sessions in one click
overview.historyEmpty: History appears after you refresh usage

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.desc: Manage your Trae accounts and switch IDE sessions manually
accounts.empty: No accounts — click Add account on the left
accounts.tipSwitch: Switch writes the target session and restarts Trae — for daily work / personal accounts
accounts.tipCleanSwitch: (Advanced) Cleans local cache and device ID first — only when sessions break; may violate ToS
accounts.switchTitleCurrent: This account is already active in Trae IDE
accounts.switchTitle: Switch Trae IDE to this account's session
accounts.cleanSwitchTitle: Advanced: clean environment then switch — may violate ToS
accounts.alertExpiringRefresh: Token expiring soon — try refresh or browser re-login
accounts.alertExpiringPrelogin: Token expiring soon — update login early

clean.title: Environment clean
clean.desc: Reset Trae local cache and device ID (advanced — use with caution)
clean.warning: Resets Trae local device ID and login cache. Use only when sessions are corrupted or IDE won't log in — not to bypass billing or risk controls.
clean.step1: Close Trae IDE and clear cache / login state
clean.step2: Reset local machineId and related device identifiers
clean.step3: Return to Accounts and switch to your target account
clean.logPlaceholder: Log output appears here when cleaning starts…
clean.confirmBody:
This will clean Trae local cache and reset device ID. Trae will close.
May violate Trae ToS — do not use to bypass billing or risk controls.
clean.cleanSwitchConfirm: Will: clean environment (reset device ID) → switch account → open Trae
clean.cleanSwitchWarn: May violate Trae ToS and trigger risk controls — use only when sessions are broken.

settings.title: Settings
settings.traePathDesc: Required to locate Trae when switching accounts
settings.privacyDesc: Tokens and cookies stay on this machine only. No auto-rotate or billing bypass.
settings.usageMonitorDesc: Periodically fetch API usage per account — informational only, min 5 min interval
settings.notificationsDesc: System alerts for token expiry or low quota (quota alerts off by default)
settings.autoBackupDesc: Export account backup to a local folder on schedule (plain JSON)

addDialog.title: Add account
addDialog.browserStep2: Sign in to trae.ai in the popup
addDialog.browserStep3: Account is added automatically when done
addDialog.tokenStep1: Open trae.ai in a browser and sign in
addDialog.tokenStep3: Copy the token or full JSON from the response
addDialog.traeStep1: Sign in to the target account in Trae IDE

importDialog.title: Import accounts
importDialog.hint: Pick a JSON backup; encrypted backups need the export password

detailDialog.title: Account details
detailDialog.machineWarn: Used for Trae local sessions. Changing it may trigger risk controls — use only when necessary.
detailDialog.regenConfirm:
Regenerating machineId may trigger Trae risk controls and may violate ToS.

Use only when sessions are abnormal. Continue?

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.p1: TraeHop is a local session manager for Trae accounts you legally own.
disclaimer.li1: All tokens, cookies, and account data stay on your computer — nothing is uploaded; we do not intercept Trae traffic
disclaimer.li2: Manual switching only — no auto-rotate on quota exhaustion, arbitrage, or billing bypass
disclaimer.li3: Use may violate Trae ToS — you assume all risks including account restrictions
disclaimer.li4: Do not use for bulk registration, quota arbitrage, or reselling accounts
disclaimer.li5: Reset & switch and device ID changes are advanced and may trigger risk controls
disclaimer.footer: Continuing means you accept these terms.

toast.passwordMin6: Password must be at least 6 characters
toast.tokenRefreshedStillExpiring: Token refreshed but still expiring — use browser re-login
toast.browserLogin: Sign in as {label} in the popup
toast.prelogin: Sign in as {label} in the popup to refresh token early
